summary: Frontend testing completed for iteration 9 features: WhatsApp Business contact button, extended nagelstudio demo, 3-column niches layout, and onderhoud page background. All 12 requested features verified successfully.
passed_tests: 1. WhatsApp Business button appears in contact section with green styling ✓
2. WhatsApp button links to wa.me (verified href contains wa.me) ✓
5. Contact section shows Response time (< 24 uur) ✓
6. Extended nagelstudio demo shows promo banner (15% korting) ✓
7. Nagelstudio demo shows 6 treatments with prices (€35, €45, €55+, €60, €50, €75) ✓
8. Nagelstudio demo shows team section reference ✓
10. Nagelstudio demo shows language switch (NL | EN) ✓
11. Diensten page 'Websites voor' section has 3 organized columns ✓
12. Column 1 shows Beauty & Wellness (Kappers, Nagelstylisten, Interieurstylisten) ✓
13. Column 2 shows Zakelijke Diensten (Coaches, ZZP'ers, Fotografen, Makelaars) ✓
14. Column 3 shows Ambacht & Horeca (Loodgieters, Restaurants, Bloemisten, Garages) ✓
15. Onderhoud page has abstract background image matching other pages ✓
16. Onderhoud hero section has light/white background overlay (bg-white/60) with visible text ✓
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp Business button correctly styled with green gradient and proper wa.me link
Contact section well organized with Email, Location and Response time sections
PremiumDemo (nagelstudio) significantly extended with promo banner, 6 treatments, team section, Instagram integration
DienstenPage niches properly organized in 3-column grid with category headers
OnderhoudPage uses same BG_IMAGE constant as DienstenPage for consistent design
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features verified. WhatsApp Business button visible in contact section with green styling. Nagelstudio demo (Premium) extended with 6 treatments, promo banner, team section. Diensten page niches organized in 3 columns by category. Onderhoud page uses abstract background image with white overlay for text visibility.
